relationships.context: cleanup-root is part of the root clearinghouse system
cleanup-root executes via the root_cleanup.py script
Relies on config file for list of protected directories
Moves unprotected items into Inbox/ for processing
Supports --dry-run flag to preview without changes
Script lives within the N5/scripts/ infrastructure
